title: TraceEvent Schema
description: A CTL record representing a single decision or observation during an active Project Lumina session.

record_id.description: Unique identifier for this record (UUID v4).

prev_record_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the previous record's canonical JSON, or 'genesis' for the first record.

timestamp_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this event occurred.

session_id.description: UUID of the session this event belongs to.

actor_id.description: Pseudonymous identifier of the actor (student, orchestrator, domain authority).

invariant_id.description: ID of the invariant checked (for invariant_check events).

standing_order_id.description: ID of the standing order applied (for standing_order_applied events).

standing_order_attempt.description: Which attempt number this is for the standing order (1-indexed).

decision.description: Structured description of the orchestrator's decision. No transcript content.

evidence_summary.description: Structured evidence summary for this turn. Field vocabulary is domain-owned; no raw text or transcript content.

state_snapshot_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the compressed state after this event.

domain_pack_id.description: Domain pack active during this event.

domain_pack_version.description: Version of the domain pack active during this event.

metadata.description: Additional structured metadata. Must not contain PII or transcript content. For turn-processing provenance events, metadata SHOULD include: runtime provenance keys (domain_pack_id, domain_pack_version, domain_physics_hash, system_physics_hash, global_prompt_hash, domain_prompt_hash, turn_interpretation_prompt_hash, system_prompt_hash), input hash keys (turn_data_hash, prompt_contract_hash), model identity keys (model_id, model_version), and when present post-payload hash keys (tool_results_hash, llm_payload_hash, response_hash). The 'system_physics_hash' key MUST contain the SHA-256 hex digest of the active system-physics.json at the time of the event, linking every domain trace event to the system layer version in effect and enabling cross-ledger auditability between the system CTL and domain/session CTLs. The 'model_id' key SHOULD contain the identifier of the LLM model used for this turn (e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514'). The 'model_version' key SHOULD contain the version or revision of the model. For novel_synthesis_flagged events, metadata MUST include 'novel_synthesis_signal' (the signal_type value from the domain physics invariant that fired).
